claim: Surfactin producing cells and exopolymer producing cells cooperate to generate "Van Gogh" bundles that have sliding abilities on specialized media.
evidence_sentences: The formation of van Gogh bundles depends critically on the synergistic interaction of surfactin-producing and matrix-producing cells.
We propose that surfactin-producing cells reduce the friction between cells and their substrate, thereby facilitating matrix-producing cells to form bundles.
